pageContext.name: Dark Aspirations
pageContext.description: Sideshow and ACME Archives are thrilled to present the Dark Aspirations Fine Art Lithograph!  This Rogue One: A Star Wars Story interpretive artwork by Candice Dailey features Darth Vader illuminated by the fiery lava with which his evolution has become synonymous.  Limited to 250 pieces, this lithograph print is hand-numbered and comes with a certificate of authenticity. A truly beautiful addition to any gallery, and a must-have for fans of Star Wars art!
